sourceTitle: Relevant Policies for the Use of AI Tools
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Business Conduct Policy: Staff must act with honesty and integrity, safeguard confidential information, and prevent unauthorized disclosures. Prohibits recording conversations without consent. AI transcription/assistant tools may not be used to secretly record or join meetings.
rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
